content: Skip to login   Skip to main content   Skip to chat     Corporate     Research and insights     Global markets research   Global markets research   Keeping clients informed with research and insights.    Keeping our clients informed    Our markets team is keeping clients informed with in-depth analysis on the Australian economy, foreign currency, fixed income, credit and commodities markets.    Explore our research and insights below and subscribe to our publications of interest to have it delivered to your inbox.    Latest market updates   The Morning Call Podcast   Start your day with the NAB Morning Call Podcast, for the latest overnight key economic and market information straight from our team of experts.     Listen now , opens in new window   Net Zero Survey   Read our Net Zero Survey insights.    Read more , opens in new window   NAB Business Survey   Read our monthly NAB Business Survey.     Read more , opens in new window   Subscribe to wholesale and retail research (for NAB customers)   Fixed income research   Analysis, forecasts and strategy on Australian Commonwealth Government bonds and semi-government bonds.     Foreign exchange research   Analysis, forecasts and strategy on foreign exchange markets.    Credit research   Australian and global credit markets research.    Australian economics   In-depth analysis of the Australian economy.    Subscribe now , opens in new window   View our forecasts   Interest rate forecasts   Interest rate forecasts for Australia and offshore policy rates.    Economic forecasts   Economic forecasts for the Australian economy including GDP, CPI, wages and unemployment rates.   Exchange rate forecasts   Spot exchange rate forecasts for major currencies.    Our awards    #1 for FX Forecasting1 and Commentary on Currency Markets1,2    #1 for Most Valuable Domestic Economic Analysis2    #1 for Most Useful Trading Ideas for Interest Rate Swaps3    #1 for Access to Analysts / Economists2    #1 for Most Valuable International Corporate Bond/Credit Research4    #1 for Most Valuable International Market Strategy for Bonds/Semis4    #1 for Most Valuable Technical / Quantitative Analysis2    #1 for Relationships Citing Quality Research2    Important Information   Terms and Conditions    This section contains Important Information relevant to the page you are viewing, but you can't see it because you have JavaScript disabled on your browser. Please enable JavaScript and come back so you can see the complete page. It's important that you read the Important Information in this section before acting on any information on this page.
